pi_items.metadata_value: UniProt cytochrome c sequences (P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, P62895)
pi_items.verified_value: UniProt cytochrome c sequences (P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, P62895)
pi_items.source: Manual verification via UniProt REST API (curl) and inspection of install_ugene.sh showing dynamic download of exactly these accessions.
Task description explicitly dictates this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real cytochrome c protein sequences downloaded from the UniProt REST API during environment setup, explicitly containing accessions P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, and P62895. The expected output file path is exactly ~/UGENE_Data/results/cytochrome_c_tree.nwk as instructed by the prompt.
